name: MacBook Screen Nested Photo Booth
description: Meta composition showing MacBook screen with Photo Booth window containing bedroom scene - screen-within-screen realism

layer_1_physical.foreground_anchor: thin strip of physical keyboard visible at lower edge

layer_2_interface.description: macOS dark mode desktop with Photo Booth live-preview window

layer_3_nested_content.description: inside Photo Booth window - dim bedroom scene with girl

pose_action.dynamic_elements: holding iPhone 15 Pro in right hand

nested_environment.location: dim bedroom visible in Photo Booth

background: macOS dark mode desktop with Photo Booth window
thin strip of physical keyboard visible at lower edge

lighting.type: ambient room light mixed with screen glow

flattened_prompt: hyper-realistic photograph of MacBook screen, downward high-angle shot, screen filling 95% of frame, visible pixel grid dust particles fingerprint smudges on glass, faint ambient reflections, macOS dark mode desktop, Photo Booth live-preview window dominant, inside window shows young woman blonde shoulder-length hair relaxed candid expression, lying in dim bedroom off-white wall rumpled bedding, wearing black top grey bottoms, holding iPhone 15 Pro, cool screen glow mixed with warm skin tones, deep nocturnal shadows, low-key intimate lighting, thin keyboard strip visible at bottom, 3:4 aspect ratio

flux.prompt: hyper-realistic photo of MacBook screen, downward high-angle, screen filling frame, visible pixel grid dust fingerprints on glass, macOS dark mode Photo Booth window showing young woman blonde hair relaxed expression lying in dim bedroom off-white wall rumpled bedding, black top grey bottoms holding iPhone, cool screen glow warm skin tones deep shadows, keyboard visible at bottom, 3:4

midjourney.prompt: hyper-realistic photograph of MacBook screen with Photo Booth app, dark mode interface, window shows blonde woman in dim bedroom rumpled bedding, screen has dust and fingerprints, cool blue glow warm skin tones, nocturnal intimate mood, nested meta composition --ar 3:4 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic screen photography look

ideogram.prompt: Photograph looking down at MacBook screen displaying Photo Booth application in dark mode, the window shows a young blonde woman lying in a dim bedroom with off-white walls and rumpled bedding, realistic screen with dust particles and fingerprints visible, cool screen glow lighting

recraft.prompt: MacBook screen photograph, Photo Booth window showing blonde woman in dim bedroom, dark mode interface, screen dust and reflections, nocturnal mood

luma.prompt: Looking down at MacBook screen, Photo Booth window shows woman shifting slightly in dim bedroom, cool screen glow flickers subtly, ambient room light reflects on glass surface
luma.motion_notes: Subtle movement in Photo Booth preview, slight screen flicker, ambient light shifting

reve.prompt: Meta photography in the style of screen-within-screen realism, MacBook displaying Photo Booth with young woman in nocturnal bedroom, authentic dark mode interface, dust and fingerprints on screen glass

grok-imagine.prompt: Photo of MacBook screen showing Photo Booth app, blonde woman visible in window lying in dim bedroom, dark mode interface, realistic screen with dust and fingerprints, nocturnal mood

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A hyper-realistic photograph looking down at a MacBook screen from a high angle, with the screen filling 95% of the frame. The screen surface shows subtle pixel-grid texture, tiny dust particles on the glass, faint ambient light reflections, and fingerprint smudges adding authenticity. The macOS interface is in dark mode with a Photo Booth live-preview window as the dominant element. Inside the Photo Booth window, a young woman with blonde shoulder-length hair reclines in a dim bedroom. She has a relaxed candid expression with a slight smile, looking at the screen while holding an iPhone 15 Pro in her right hand. She wears a black top and grey loungewear bottoms. The bedroom shows an off-white wall and rumpled bedding. The lighting combines cool blue-ish screen glow with warm skin tones and deep nocturnal shadows. A thin strip of physical keyboard is visible at the lower edge of the frame. The overall atmosphere is intimate and nocturnal. No watermark. No flat digital look. Realistic screen photography with authentic dust and reflections.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Hyper-realistic photograph of MacBook screen from high downward angle filling frame, visible pixel grid dust particles fingerprint smudges on glass surface, macOS dark mode Photo Booth window showing young blonde woman reclining in dim bedroom, relaxed candid expression holding iPhone, black top grey bottoms, off-white wall rumpled bedding background, cool screen glow mixed with warm skin tones deep nocturnal shadows, keyboard strip visible at bottom edge, screen-within-screen meta photography, not flat screenshot or vector art
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A photograph looking down at a MacBook screen from a high angle, screen filling 95% of frame. The glass surface shows subtle pixel-grid texture, dust particles, fingerprint smudges, and faint ambient reflections. MacOS dark mode desktop with Photo Booth live-preview window dominant. Inside the Photo Booth window, a young woman with blonde shoulder-length hair reclines in a dim bedroom with relaxed candid expression and slight smile. She wears a black top and grey loungewear, holding an iPhone 15 Pro. Background shows off-white wall and rumpled bedding. Cool blue screen glow mixes with warm skin tones and deep nocturnal shadows. Thin keyboard strip visible at bottom edge.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the Photo Booth window to show a FaceTime call interface while keeping the same blonde woman in the dim bedroom. Preserve the MacBook screen details, dust particles, fingerprints, and dark mode aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 3_technical_camera: nested composition with specific angle and framing requirements
4_negative_hygiene: excludes flat digital look, screenshot aesthetic
5_spatial_consistency: clear layer separation with foreground keyboard anchor
6_lighting_storytelling: 'cool screen glow + warm skin' = intimate nocturnal mood
